field_values.action_summary: The massive caravan, consisting of two hundred and fifty chariots, moves in eerie silence across the trackless, ochre-colored moss of the sea bottom. The setting emphasizes the isolation and the strange, silent nature of Martian travel.
field_values.camera_intent: Extreme wide shots of massive caravan movement across vast moss expanse; Low-angle tracking shots of chariot wheels on moss texture; Wide establishing shots showing lack of spoor or tracks
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Visual texture and specific ochre color of the moss
Rhythmic, synchronized movement of the 250 chariots
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH015_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the immense scale of a two hundred and fifty chariot caravan traversing an isolated, trackless sea bottom. The visual language must emphasize the eerie silence and the vastness of the ochre moss expanse to drive a sense of isolation.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- sola
- (The Caravan/Retinue)

## Required Environments
- mossy_sea_bottom

## Continuity Constraints
- Visual texture and specific ochre color of the moss
- Rhythmic, synchronized movement of the 250 chariots

## Beat List
- BT001: The vastness of the ochre sea bottom is revealed with the caravan appearing as a distant line.
- BT002: The rhythmic and silent mechanical motion of the journey is emphasized.
- BT003: The sense of isolation and introspection within the journey is established.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
